title: Malik's School Garden Through the Seasons
synopsis: Follow young Malik as he discovers the magical changes in his school garden throughout the four seasons, learning about nature's beautiful cycle of growth, change, and renewal.

chapters.title: Spring and Summer in the Garden

pages.text: Malik loves his school garden! When spring comes, he plants tiny seeds in the soft, warm dirt. The sun shines bright and gentle rain falls.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes kneeling in a school garden bed, planting seeds. Spring scene with soft pastel colors, budding trees, and small green shoots emerging from brown soil.
illustration.alt: Malik planting seeds in a spring garden

pages.text: Soon tiny green leaves peek up from the ground. Malik waters them every day with his little watering can. The plants grow taller and taller!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding a small watering can, tending to young green plants. Late spring scene with vibrant green growth and morning dewdrops on leaves.
illustration.alt: Malik watering growing plants in the garden

pages.text: In summer, the garden is full of life! Malik sees red tomatoes, yellow sunflowers, and orange carrots. Butterflies dance from flower to flower.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes standing among tall plants heavy with vegetables and flowers. Bright summer colors with butterflies, bees, and full leafy growth throughout the garden.
illustration.alt: Malik in a lush summer garden with vegetables and butterflies

pages.text: The summer sun makes everything grow big and strong. Malik picks fresh vegetables to share with his friends at snack time. Yummy!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding a basket filled with colorful vegetables. Peak summer scene with abundant harvest, golden sunlight filtering through green leaves.

pages.text: When fall arrives, the garden changes colors. The leaves turn red, orange, and yellow. Malik helps rake the fallen leaves into big, crunchy piles.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes using a small rake among autumn trees. Warm fall colors with red, orange, and yellow leaves scattered on the ground and floating in the air.
illustration.alt: Malik raking colorful autumn leaves in the garden

pages.text: The air gets cooler and the days get shorter. Some plants go to sleep for the winter. Malik covers the garden beds with cozy blankets of leaves.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes spreading leaves over garden beds. Late autumn scene with bare branches, muted earth tones, and the garden being prepared for winter rest.
illustration.alt: Malik preparing the garden for winter with leaf cover

pages.text: Winter brings snow to the quiet garden. Everything looks peaceful and white. Malik knows the plants are sleeping safely under the snow blanket.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes standing in the snow-covered garden. Cool winter scene with white snow covering the beds, bare tree branches, and soft blue-gray winter light.
illustration.alt: Malik viewing the snow-covered winter garden

pages.text: Soon spring will come again! The snow will melt, new seeds will be planted, and Malik's garden will wake up. The seasons go round and round, just like a circle.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes looking at the garden with small patches of snow melting and tiny green shoots beginning to emerge. Early spring transition with hope and renewal in soft, awakening colors.
illustration.alt: Malik watching the garden begin to wake up in early spring

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Malik plant in the spring garden?
questions.explanation: Malik plants tiny seeds in the soft, warm dirt when spring comes to his school garden.

questions.question: What colors do the leaves turn in fall?
questions.explanation: In fall, the garden leaves change to beautiful warm colors: red, orange, and yellow.

questions.question: What covers the garden in winter?
questions.explanation: Winter brings snow that covers the quiet garden like a cozy white blanket while the plants sleep.

questions.question: What does Malik use to water his plants?
questions.explanation: Malik waters his growing plants every day with his little watering can.
